heading: Definitions
label: 1521 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle B (§§ 221–229) of title II of div. N of , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 114–113

children.heading: Agency
children.label: 1 Agency
children.text: The term “agency” has the meaning given the term in .section 3502 of title 44

children.heading: Agency information system
children.label: 2 Agency information system
children.text: The term “agency information system” has the meaning given the term in .section 660 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Homeland Security of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Cybersecurity risk; information system
children.label: 4 Cybersecurity risk; information system
children.text: The terms “cybersecurity risk” and “information system” have the meanings given those terms in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Director
children.label: 5 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Office of Management and Budget.

children.heading: Intelligence community
children.label: 6 Intelligence community
children.text: The term “intelligence community” has the meaning given the term in .section 3003(4) of title 50

children.heading: National security system
children.label: 7 National security system
children.text: The term “national security system” has the meaning given the term in .section 11103 of title 40

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 8 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.
